case_title: ANNA STEPHENS ET AL VS. MERIDIAN SURVEYING ENGINEERING, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $72.50 SERVED SEP-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN SURVEYING ENGINEERING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPHENS, ANNA STEPHENS, CRIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN SURVEYING ENGINEERING, INC. GERY, STANLEY T (PRESIDENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT / SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANNA STEPHENS WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRIS STEPHENS--SON & SURVIVING FAMILY MEMBER. DEFENDANT STANLEY GEARY WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY EMILY THOMAS--PROJECT MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY EMILY THOMAS--PROJECT MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.
